triggers: Touches server/build config (next.config.mjs, instrumentation.ts) — a misconfiguration silently breaks error capture
withSentryConfig tunneling option can inadvertently expose an internal proxy route
Source map upload to Sentry exposes minified source — must never upload to public CDN
New metrics endpoint must not be publicly accessible without auth
logger.ts changes must not widen PII/secret logging surface
Build pipeline (CI) changes affect every future deployment
lane_rationale: All gaps are confirmed and well-understood; the high-level design is known (withSentryConfig + instrumentation.ts + Sentry spans + metrics endpoint). No novel product logic, no new data models, no auth surface changes. One Red Team sprint is sufficient.
